ground_truth.title: New UI 2024
ground_truth.author: Payam Montie
ground_truth.main_content:
Payam Montie
Posted March 5, 2024

I don't like this new look; not that it's bad at all but the previous UI was much more sophisticated and beautiful. It was pretty functional and at the same time very user friendly. The main difference is the borderlines for each section which is gone now. Now it's like sections are somehow mixed together.

They say this is also modern; yes, but previous UI was modern as well. In short, this new update is disappointing. I just wish it goes back to the previous look, or at least we have the option to choose which UI to use.

Soapm
Posted March 5, 2024

I agree with you, I went with this application some years ago because it was trim, intuitive interface and no fuss. They've done changed it to where I can't find anything, the customization (number of settings) are now gone and we have this ugly interface. The previous UI was 1000x better.

I'm really thinking of leaping ship. This isn't the little note keeping application that drew me to it. It's now more than just a simple note keeper, this thing has become more than what I need.

Dave-in-Decatur
Posted March 5, 2024

@Soapm, I think @Payam Montie is talking about the changed interface that appeared in v. 10 a few weeks ago, not the difference between v. 10 an Legacy (which I think you're talking about, but I could be wrong). IAC, here's the place to tell Evernote directly what you think of the recently changed v. 10 interface: https://waz9zvkd1f2.typeform.com/newuifeedback.

Payam Montie
Posted March 10, 2024

Dave-in-Decatur said:
@Soapm, I think @Payam Montie is talking about the changed interface that appeared in v. 10 a few weeks ago, not the difference between v. 10 an Legacy (which I think you're talking about, but I could be wrong). IAC, here's the place to tell Evernote directly what you think of the recently changed v. 10 interface: https://waz9zvkd1f2.typeform.com/newuifeedback.

Yes we are talking about V10 changes in February and it is dissatisfying. I really hop Evernote give the option in the settings to change it back to before the update if the user wants.

PinkElephant
Posted March 10, 2024

We can only speculate about the inner workings at EN, but I don't expect any reversal.

If not satisfied, use the link already posted. The more precise you are in describing your problems, the better.

Not: Don't like the colors.

Better: The difference in color between selected notes and the others is not visible enough.

Cristiano478
Posted March 10, 2024

I liked the new design but it would be better if there was the possibility of changing the colors of some parts, especially the left panel, to make it more contrasting.
